sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25235" key="dia/meiptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάμειπτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n25235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">communicable,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
